description: Lock canal lock gates to navigation-lock infrastructure, not municipal water supply, guild administration, or vessel rudders.

checks.reason: The node is anchored to the first recorded chamber/pound lock on China's Grand Canal.
Canal lock gates are defined as gated lock infrastructure in a canal or navigable waterway.
The first scoped chamber lock is navigation engineering, not water-guild administration.
Municipal drinking-water supply is a different water-system scope from boat navigation locks.
Sternpost rudders are vessel steering equipment, not lock-gate infrastructure.
